title: What would happen if
wikitext:
[]: What would happen if.... Post by CyberXIII » Thu Dec 10, 2009 1:29 am Someone took Adam's embryo, and handed it to one of the Angels? Reichu's fic got me thinking what would happen if Adam's babies ever reached their parent...

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Dec 10, 2009 1:34 am They become Adam, release an Anti-AT Field that wipes out all Lilith-derived Organisms, then populates the planet with her own children.

[]: Post by child of Lilith » Thu Dec 10, 2009 2:22 am It would be the end of the world for us humans and the dawning of a new age for the angels.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Dec 10, 2009 6:25 am Angelic Third Impact.

[]: Post by ZapX » Thu Dec 10, 2009 6:27 am Really? Really?! Search function/thread list is your friend.
